---
title: "IBM Apologizes 52 Years Later"
description: "On the firing of computer pioneer Lynn Conway, and an apology a half-century in arrears."
author: "synesis"
date: "2020-11-20"
categories: [history, society, personal, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![IBM apologizes for firing computer pioneer Lynn Conway. Image from [Forbes](https://www.forbes.com/sites/jeremyalicandri/2020/11/18/ibm-apologizes-for-firing-computer-pioneer/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

It's never too late to do the right thing. Proud to be an ex-IBMer.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_ibm-apologizes-for-firing-computer-pioneer-activity-6735397675098800128-BJAw).*
